acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Shell product QUIC result checker rejects sender_log outside sender.evidenceDir and receiver_log or payload_validation_evidence outside receiver.evidenceDir.
Path binding is boundary-aware and rejects sibling endpoint-directory prefixes.
Rust ProductQuicSmokeResult::validate mirrors the shell endpoint artifact directory contract.
Cross-device validation docs document the endpoint-directory binding rule.
Scope excludes live product QUIC, UDP/LAN, Mac hardware, certificate handoff, decode, render, presentation, latency, workflow dispatch, and credential-dependent claims.

realWorldValidation.evidence: This is a product QUIC result-schema and evidence-hygiene contract node. It uses local fixture/checker validation and Rust unit tests only; it does not run live product QUIC, UDP/LAN connectivity, Mac hardware, certificate handoff, decode, render, presentation, latency, workflow dispatch, or credential-dependent validation.
